Description: Sprint 0: Review and sign off all pre-implementation documentation. Gap analysis, architecture review, security review, design system alignment, Jira backlog import.
Sprint 1: Monorepo scaffold, Docker Compose, FastAPI/Next.js shells, Celery, CI/CD, staging ECS deploy.
Sprint 2: JWT auth, RBAC, matter walls, domain entities, identity/cases schema, audit log, outbox, login UI.
Sprint 3: Case and client CRUD, participants, tasks, deadlines, notes, timeline API and UI.
Sprint 4: Document upload/OCR, async AI summary, approval flow, n8n private deploy, first workflow.
Sprint 5: Observability, security hardening, load tests, production AWS, go-live.
